description: Evaluates security training maturity—program governance, KPIs/KRIs, curriculum development, role-based and segmented training, onboarding awareness, phishing simulation, technical training, AI-era threat awareness, and training delivery automation.

capabilities.name: Service exists and is in good condition
capabilities.description: A security training program or service exists, is scoped appropriately, and is reviewed at least quarterly for efficacy.
evaluation_focus: Enterprise security training program or service exists
Regular security training program efficacy review

capabilities.name: KPIs/KRIs
capabilities.description: Security training KPIs and KRIs—including completion rates, phishing simulation click rates, and overdue training counts—are documented and reviewed at least quarterly.
evaluation_focus: Documented KPIs and KRIs for security training
Regular KPI/KRI review
Training completion and overdue metrics
Phishing simulation click and report rates

capabilities.name: Training curriculum and content development
capabilities.description: The enterprise proactively develops or sources security training content aligned to risk priorities and reviews the curriculum at least quarterly.
evaluation_focus: Proactive development or sourcing of security education content
Dedicated content creators or vendor partnerships
Regular curriculum review and refresh

capabilities.name: Role-based and segmented training
capabilities.description: Security trainings are tailored to specific functional units, risk profiles, and user segments across the enterprise.
evaluation_focus: Tailored security trainings for specific functional units
Segmented security training for various user groups and risk profiles

capabilities.name: Onboarding and mandatory awareness
capabilities.description: New hires and contractors complete mandatory security awareness training before accessing enterprise resources, with quarterly compliance review.
evaluation_focus: Mandatory security awareness for new hires and contractors
Training completion before resource access
Regular compliance review of onboarding training

capabilities.name: Phishing simulation and social engineering drills
capabilities.description: Phishing simulations and social engineering drills run on a defined cadence with remediation for repeat failures and quarterly program review.
evaluation_focus: Regular phishing simulation campaigns
Social engineering drill scenarios beyond email
Remediation for repeat simulation failures

capabilities.name: Technical security training
capabilities.description: Developers, administrators, and other technical roles receive specialized secure-coding, configuration, and operational security training reviewed at least quarterly.
evaluation_focus: Secure coding and SDLC training for developers
Administrative and operational security training for IT roles
Regular technical training curriculum review

capabilities.name: AI-era and emerging threat awareness
capabilities.description: Training covers AI-augmented threats, shadow AI risks, deepfakes, and social engineering tactics and is refreshed at least quarterly.
evaluation_focus: AI-augmented attack and social engineering awareness
Shadow AI and approved-tool usage training
Regular refresh of emerging-threat training content

capabilities.name: Training delivery platform and automation
capabilities.description: A training delivery platform automates assignment, tracking, reminders, and reporting enterprise-wide with quarterly configuration review.
evaluation_focus: Enterprise-wide training delivery platform
Automated assignment, tracking, and reminders
Regular platform configuration and integration review

evaluation.resiliency_weight_policy: Ask stakeholder for per-capability weights when adding a new evaluation service. This service uses weight 1 for all capabilities.
evaluation.pillar_policy: Some services may have no Technology capabilities; in those cases, do not compute or report a Technology pillar score.
